sglang.author: hebiao064
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In VERL + SGLang case, we need to run extra pip install torch_memory_saver to make it work.
In Production, we want to avoid such hustle, since each new package introduced into our company need some license validation process. If we can add into SGLang it can make our life easier.

The tor

sglang.title: Fix two issues related to `--moe-dense-tp-size=1`
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

There were two issues related to --moe-dense-tp-size=1 with DP attention:

The CUDA graph runner overestimated the buffer size required by DP attention, which may prevent the execution of cuda graph (#5527)
dp<tp is not executable when --moe-dense-tp-size=1 (#5656).

This PR fixes the tw

The behavior of the OpenAI API is to set the "id" and "type

This PR fixes cases where it was used, making the Python much more readable/maintainable in the process.

vllm.title: [Core] Use platform-agnostic device control for DP engine core
vllm.author: jianzs
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Refactor the DP engine core to use the platform-specific device_control_env_var attribute instead of hardcoding CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES. This change improves platform compatibility and code maintainability.
The update includes:

Moving the device_id_to_physical_device_id function to a shared utils file

vllm.title: [v1][KVCacheManager] Change prefix caching metric from counting blocks to counting tokens
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt: If hybrid allocator is introduced, it would be difficult to count the number of hit blocks as blocks will be organized in a complex data structure. To ensure the compatibility with prefix caching metrics, this PR changes the metrics to count the hit tokens. It should give very similar result to coun

Increase the output length limit. The failures occur when we cut off
the output be

Addresses issues with both the FP8 W8A8 and FP8 Marlin path.
Marlin needed to allow for the layer to not have weight_block_sizes present, and both paths needed to update their ignored modules check to work with fused modules.
Manually verified evals:
FP8 W8A8
WARNING 05-12 16:46

vllm.title: [Model] Support MiMo-7B inference with MTP
vllm.author: bwshen-mi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
MiMo-7B is a decoder-only
Transformer LM with MTP layers that exhibits extraordinary reasoning potential.
The model and technical report are open-sourced in https://github.com/XiaomiMiMo/MiMo
We provide the main block and MTP layer definition, as well as tweaking the config in this PR.
We hope MiMo

vllm.title: Remove noisy warnings from `SchedulerConfig`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Removes noisy warnings that appear when SchedulerConfig is default constructed (it is default constructed by get_kwargs when building the CLI args).
They could mislead the user into thinking that they have not set max_model_len in ModelConfig correctly. And max_num_seqs is a magic number depending o

Instead of disabling cache when dummy data is generated, the cache is now always enabled. To conserve memory, the cache is instead clea

vllm.title: [v1][KVCacheManager] Avoid full cache hit by controlling max_length
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt: When prompt length is divisible by the block size and all blocks are cached, we need to recompute the last token. Instead of handling it by removing the last block hash, it can also be achieved by set max_cache_hit_length to prompt_length - 1 and pass max_cache_hit_length to find_longest_cache_hit.
